headlines.title: Discomfort with modern technology shapes Gen Z's desire to live in the past
headlines.description: Some members of Gen Z are feeling so pessimistic about the future of the country and modern technology that they want to hop in a time machine

headlines.title: Trump embraced the gambling industry for decades. Now he's hedging his bet on prediction markets.
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday bemoaned to reporters the surge of interest in gambling and prediction markets in recent years, but he and his administration have been all in on the phenomenon, an NBC News review shows."You know, the whole world, unfortunately, has become somewhat of a casino.

headlines.title: Judge questions legal basis for Trump's $10 billion case against IRS
headlines.description: A federal judge is asking the Justice Department and President Donald Trump's private attorneys to explain whether his $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service, an agency he oversees as president, is the type of dispute federal courts can consider.U.S.

headlines.title: FDA moves to fast-track three psychedelic drugs for review
headlines.description: A day after the DOJ said it would ease restrictions on medical marijuana, the FDA moves to fast-track some experimental psychedelic drugs for review. They're looking at three drugs for treatment-resistant depression, major depressive disorder, and PTSD. NBC's Anne Thompson reports.

headlines.title: Justice Department ends criminal probe of Powell
headlines.description: The Justice Department announced it would end its criminal investigation into outgoing Fed chair Jerome Powell. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

headlines.title: House Republican defends her immigration reform bill amid conservative pushback
headlines.description: Rep. María Elvira Salazar (R-Fla.) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss the Congressional gridlock over immigration as the partial government shutdown reaches Day 70 and the Department of Homeland Security is poised to exhaust all of its funds by the end of the month. Salazar also responds to the recent GOP redistricting push in Florida and explains how it may impact her own race come November.

headlines.title: Trump may send Afghan allies who were promised new lives in the U.S. to Congo instead
headlines.description: Hundreds of Afghan refugees who helped the United States fight the Taliban may be sent to the Democratic Republic of Congo after the Trump administration halted their U.S. resettlement, an advocacy group said

headlines.title: A year after DOGE, former federal employees are still looking for work
headlines.description: After he applied to his 599th job, John Burg stopped counting

headlines.title: Full interview: Tom Llamas exclusive with President Trump
headlines.description: In the full interview with NBC News’ Tom Llamas, President Donald Trump addresses the backlash to immigration enforcement, the state of the American economy, U.S. tensions with Iran and other topics at the White House. The interview was conducted on Wednesday, February 4.

headlines.title: Maine Gov. Janet Mills vetoes ban on data center construction
headlines.description: Maine Gov. Janet Mills on Friday vetoed a hallmark bill that would have halted the construction of large data centers in the New England state for 18 months

headlines.title: The lure of living in the past: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail

headlines.title: DOJ aims to strip citizenship from hundreds of foreign-born Americans, sources say
headlines.description: The Justice Department is targeting at least 300 foreign-born Americans to possibly revoke their citizenship as part of the Trump administration’s effort to ramp up denaturalization, according to a person familiar with the investigations.
